annex_iv_gaps.label: System description, version, and intended purpose (Annex IV §1)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete System description, version, and intended purpose (Annex IV §1). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Design specifications and development process (Annex IV §2)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Design specifications and development process (Annex IV §2). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Training data, training methodology, and dataset practices (Annex IV §3)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Training data, training methodology, and dataset practices (Annex IV §3). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Validation and testing procedures + performance metrics (Annex IV §4)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Validation and testing procedures + performance metrics (Annex IV §4). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Applicable harmonised standards or common specifications complied with (Annex IV §5)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Applicable harmonised standards or common specifications complied with (Annex IV §5). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Quality management system documentation (Art 17) (Annex IV §6)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Quality management system documentation (Art 17) (Annex IV §6). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Art 9 risk-management system documentation (Annex IV §7)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Art 9 risk-management system documentation (Annex IV §7). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Post-market monitoring plan + substantial-modification log (Annex IV §8)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Post-market monitoring plan + substantial-modification log (Annex IV §8). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: Conformity assessment procedure applied (Annex IV §9)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete Conformity assessment procedure applied (Annex IV §9). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

annex_iv_gaps.label: EU declaration of conformity reference (Annex IV §10)
annex_iv_gaps.remediation: Complete EU declaration of conformity reference (Annex IV §10). Verify requirement against EU AI Act Annex IV consolidated text.

output.applicable_date_note: Annex III high-risk obligations: Digital Omnibus proposes 2 Dec 2027 (provisional agreement 7 May 2026). Verify formal-adoption status against Official Journal before relying on this date. Original date: 2 Aug 2026.
output.ce_readiness_note: CE-marking prerequisites NOT met — Annex IV technical documentation and/or Articles 9/10/15/17 obligations have gaps. Address gaps before conformity assessment.
output.conformity_route_note: Internal-control route selected. Permitted for high-risk systems where harmonised standards exist or Art 43(4) conditions are met. Verify applicability against consolidated Art 43 text. Decision-support note — not a legal determination.

declaration_of_conformity_skeleton.note: DECISION-SUPPORT SKELETON ONLY — not a legally-binding EU Declaration of Conformity. Prepare and sign the actual declaration following EU AI Act Art 47 requirements. Have it reviewed by qualified legal counsel.

template.harmonised_standards: [List applicable harmonised standards, or state: none yet published]
template.statement: The AI system described above conforms to Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 and the applicable conformity assessment procedure has been carried out.

output.note: PREPARE-AHEAD — Decision-support draft for conformity-pack planning. Outputs are not legal conformity certificates or CE-marking authorisations. Verify all Art/Annex references against EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) consolidated text at https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1689/oj.
